candidate_llm_application: LLM activation faceting: cut model's representation space into N-fold symmetric features (sparse autoencoder); each feature defect reduces interpretability brilliance.

results.title: Sparse Autoencoders / Dictionary Learning Interpretability: Survey
results.snippet: This 2025-2026 paper presents work on sparse autoencoders / dictionary learning interpretability, covering LLM-side mechanisms that achieve similar functional outcomes via alternative terminology.
